title: Sushi Go Crafting
description: A food mod for making Sushi!
body:
![Sushi Go Crafting banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G9WbcGQ2/images/43e4631dfd15f93642f235b251b6185a7a8fd674.png)

 Join my Discord  Support me on Patreon  Follow me on twitter

**Sushi Go Crafting** is a food mod where you make sushi with a small discovery minigame to get the perfect food and get amazing food effects. It adds different types of Sushi to suit your needs with different combination of ingredients. ![The blocks in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G9WbcGQ2/images/b8063f2d8ee0c9f3e8d7b71e3c8a4bb432fd66a8.jpeg) Each **ingredient** has a different effect or modifier effect and they get all combined when making a Sushi Roll so when you eat you will receive more than food/saturation. ![Example sushi roll](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G9WbcGQ2/images/0ecce1972673513a5cf72bd5091afd13c32d7931.png) ### Current Types Of Sushi: - Maki - Gunkan - California - Nigiri - Onigiri - Temaki ![Sushi item textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/G9WbcGQ2/images/113fe99782bdf6b50047bb0e6873a0dc3cdbf08f.png) This mod adds worldgen for Avocado Trees and Seaweed, also adds Tuna and Shrimp into the ocean. (It depends on **[Titanium](https://modrinth.com/mod/titanium)**, and requires **[JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)** and **[Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli)** for a better experience)
